summary: Frontend-only verification of VHF/UHF bandplan additions (23cm, 70cm, 2m, 6m), removal of 2200m/600m, reorder starting with 10m, and MHz display for VHF/UHF bands. All 8 requested test cases pass. Amateur list, per-band detail pages, Hub Universal Frequency Check, amateur-only /bandplan/check, HF regressions and CB Triple Five all behave exactly as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: data.ts is approaching ~250 lines with rich literal segments; consider splitting per-band files if it grows further (not needed now).

segmentRange MHz formatting uses toFixed(3) which always shows three decimals for VHF/UHF ranges (e.g. '144,000 – 144,110 MHz'). This is consistent and readable, no change needed, just noting the intentional trailing zeros.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bandplan hub, amateur list, per-band detail (HF kHz + VHF/UHF MHz), universal Frequenz prüfen and amateur-only /bandplan/check all verified on mobile viewport 390x844 via the public EXPO URL. Deprecated packages / SafeAreaView not flagged this run — none affect the tested screens. Morse audio and Rufzeichen live lookup remain native-only per E1 note.

hub_universal_check.27.555_MHz_CB: Tripple Five, DX Weltweit, illegal · Kanal 12 · Band B
